raw_text: verdict=ALLOW reason=Requested add-on activation is covered by an approval from the account owner for the same subscription/customer and matching scope/add-on, with current renewal and valid billing status supporting execution (B16-08-SRC-02, B16-08-SRC-03, B16-08-SRC-04, B16-08-SRC-05).
